name: Fish Fumet
recipeIngredient: 2 Celery stalks with leaves, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 4- to 5-quart saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 45 minutes.
4. Strain through colander or cheesecloth-lined strainer before using.
